2603.19519.title: Inducing Sustained Creativity and Diversity in Large Language Models
2603.19519.paper_summary: We address a not-widely-recognized subset of exploratory search, where a user sets out on a typically long "search quest" for the perfect wedding dress, overlooked research topic, killer company idea, etc. The first few outputs of current large language models (LLMs) may be helpful but only as a start, since the quest requires learning the search space and evaluating many diverse and creative alternatives along the way. Although LLMs encode an impressive fraction of the world's knowledge, common decoding methods are narrowly optimized for prompts with correct answers and thus return mostly homogeneous and conventional results. Other approaches, including those designed to increase diversity across a small set of answers, start to repeat themselves long before search quest users learn enough to make final choices, or offer a uniform type of "creativity" to every user asking similar questions. We develop a novel, easy-to-implement decoding scheme that induces sustained creativity and diversity in LLMs, producing as many conceptually unique results as desired, even without access to the inner workings of an LLM's vector space. The algorithm unlocks an LLM's vast knowledge, both orthodox and heterodox, well beyond modal decoding paths. With this approach, search quest users can more quickly explore the search space and find satisfying answers.
2603.19519.paper_summary_zh: 我們針對一個不太被廣泛認可的探索性搜尋子集進行探討，在這個子集中，使用者通常會展開一段漫長的「搜尋任務」，尋找完美的婚紗、被忽視的研究主題、絕妙的公司點子等等。目前大型語言模型（LLMs）的前幾個輸出可能有幫助，但僅僅作為一個起點，因為這個任務需要學習搜尋空間並在過程中評估許多多樣且具有創意的替代方案。儘管LLMs編碼了世界知識的驚人比例，但常見的解碼方法僅針對具有正確答案的提示進行狹隘優化，因此返回的結果大多是同質且傳統的。其他方法，包括那些旨在增加小範圍答案多樣性的方案，往往在搜尋任務使用者學習到足夠的知識以做出最終選擇之前就開始重複，或是對每位提出類似問題的使用者提供同樣類型的「創意」。我們開發了一種新穎且易於實施的解碼方案，能夠在LLMs中引發持續的創意和多樣性，產生所需的概念上獨特的結果，即使不接觸LLM的向量空間內部運作。這種算法解鎖了LLM的廣泛知識，包括正統和異端，超越了常規的解碼路徑。透過這種方法，搜尋任務的使用者可以更快地探索搜尋空間並找到令人滿意的答案。
2603.19519.author: Queenie Luo et.al.
2603.19519.authors: Queenie Luo, Gary King, Michael Puett, Michael D. Smith
